name: IMA Studio Music Generation
tagline: Text-to-music, BGM, songs with lyrics — Suno sonic, DouBao BGM, DouBao Song. One-stop AI music generation.
description: Top-tier AI music generation. One-stop access to Suno sonic v4/v5, DouBao BGM (GenBGM), DouBao Song (GenSong). Custom mode, lyrics, vocal and style tags. Use for: text-to-music, background music, BGM, songs with lyrics, soundtrack, jingles, ambient music, vocal and instrumental tracks. Output: MP3/WAV. Optional: install ima-knowledge-ai for production workflow guidance. Requires IMA_API_KEY.
credentialNotice: The IMA API key is required at runtime (--api-key or IMA_API_KEY). It is sent only to api.imastudio.com (music generation does not use image upload endpoints). Obtain keys at https://imastudio.com. Use a scoped or test key if concerned about credential exposure.
optionalDependencyNote: When ima-knowledge-ai is installed, this skill may instruct the agent to read that skill's reference files (~/.openclaw/skills/ima-knowledge-ai/references/*) for workflow and model-selection guidance. The skill works standalone without it; those reads are optional and only for complex or multi-step workflows.

localPaths.purpose: Preferences (model defaults) and generation logs; logs auto-deleted after 7 days. User can delete anytime.

use_cases: Music generation, AI composition, BGM production
key_features: Suno sonic v5, DouBao BGM, DouBao Song
